_meta.note: Extracted from auntm.ai's public JS bundle (SPA client-side data). Immunity bands: Immunity type=... → immune; Mod Percent type=... → resist |modifier*100|%; Purify type=... → mechanic Purify. Champions released after 2024 are skipped because the bundle is frozen mid-2024 (matches DEFAULT_FRESHNESS.auntm.staleAfter). The passives object carries prose ability lines for the detail-page renderer to synthesise a PASSIVE card when MCOCHUB's kit doesn't already have one.

abomination: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
annihilus: Annihilus Purifies incoming Stun Debuffs while launching Obliterating Strikes.
ant-man: Ant-Man is Immune to Poison and Shock effects.
apocalypse: At [37bfff]3+ Genetic Code[-], become Stun Immune while striking.
bishop: Each Prowess converted also has an 100% chance to Purify a Bleed Debuff.
black-bolt: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
black-panther: When striking into an Auto-Block, Panther is Immune to Stun.
captain-marvel: Advanced Kree physiology provides full immunity to the Poisons of the Battlerealm.
cassie-lang: Cassie\u2019s highly advanced Pym Suit provides her with Buff Immunity, as well as Immunity to Poison and Shock effects.
colossus: Impenetrable armor provides full immunity to Bleeding.

Colossus is Immune to all Bleed, Incinerate, [k=glossary/coldsnap]Coldsnap[/k] & Frostbite effects. Additionally, if he\u2019s not fighting a Tech Champion, he\u2019s also immune to Armor Break and Armor Shattered Debuffs.
darkhawk: Advanced robotics provides full immunity to Poison and Bleed effects.
doctor-doom: Doom\u2019s resilient armor protects him, granting immunity to Armor Break, Armor Shatter and Shock effects.
dormammu: As a being of pure mystical energy, Dormammu, is immune to all known poisons of the Battlerealm.
Dormammu, lacks blood and is therefore immune to Bleed effects.
dragon-man: Dragon Man\u2019s thick Armor and Advanced Robotics grants full immunity to Bleed, Poison, and Armor Shattered.
dust: Dust is Immune to Bleed, [k=glossary/poison]Poison[/k], and [k=glossary/shock]Shock[/k] effects.
emma-frost: Emma\u2019s organic diamond is immune to all Stun, Bleed, Poison, Incinerate, Shock, Frostbite, [k=glossary/coldsnap]Coldsnap[/k], Fatigue, Concussion, and Exhaustion effects.
galan: Galan\u2019s otherworldly nature provides immunity to Fate Seals and Nullify effects.
gambit: These attacks utilize a burst of kinetic energy. Striking with them reduces the damage of the Opponent's Passive Degeneration and Direct Damage effects by 100% for 0.20 second(s).
ghost-rider: A lack of blood provides full immunity to Bleeding.
Being wreathed in Hellfire provides full Immunity to Incinerate
groot: A lack of blood provides full immunity to Bleeding.
havok: Havok is Immune to all forms of Incinerate.
howard-the-duck: The bulky ISO-Loader suit provides Immunity to Bleed effects.
hulk: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
hulkling: Advanced Kree-Skrull physiology provides full immunity to the Poisons and Shocks of the Battlerealm.
human-torch: Whenever Human Torch would be Incinerated, he places a Smoulder Passive on himself. Smoulder Passives deal 0 damage and last indefinitely.
Immune to Incinerate, Coldsnap and Frostbite.
hyperion: Eternal physiology grants immunity to all known poisons within the Battlerealm.
iceman: Iceman\u2019s organic ice form grants him full Immunity to all Incinerate, Nova Flame, Bleed, Poison, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects.
If Iceman would become Stunned while his Ice Armor is active, the Ice Armor negates the effect, then shatters.
ikaris: All basic attacks are Energy Damage.
joe-fixit: An enhanced immune system provides full immunity to the Poisons of the Battlerealm.
juggernaut: Juggernaut is immune to Stun Debuffs and if the opponent attempts to Stun him, he will instead apply his Heavy Attack [k=glossary/stagger]Stagger[/k] to them.
kindred: Kindred is a being forged in the flames of hell and feels nothing but contempt. They are Immune to Poison, Incinerate, Heal Block, Infuriate, and Intimidate effects.
kitty-pryde: Immune to Incinerate, thanks to Lockheed\u2019s assistance.
korg: Rock anatomy provides Korg immunity to Bleed, Shock and additional Critical Resistance but decreases his [k=glossary/energy_res]Energy Resistance[/k] by 20%.
kushala: Kushala's connection to her Spirit of Vengeance grants her immunity to all Bleed and Incinerate effects.
man-thing: Man-Thing\u2019s lack of blood also makes it Immune to Bleed effects.
medusa: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
mephisto: Immune to all known poisons of the Battlerealm.
mister-negative: Mister Negative is immune to all Nullify, [k=glossary/stagger]Stagger[/k] and Fateseal effects.
mister-sinister: Mister Sinister reduces the potency of incoming Bleed effects by 100%.
morningstar: A lack of blood provides full immunity to Bleeding.
nebula: Advanced Robotics provides full Immunity to Bleed, Poison and Shock effects.
nimrod: Advanced Robotics provides Immunity to Bleed & Poison effects.
omega-red: When striking with Tentacle Hits, reduce the damage of the Opponent's Passive Degeneration and Direct Damage effects by 100% for 0.20 second(s).
omega-sentinel: Omega Sentinel\u2019s Adaptive Body grants her Immunity to Nullify, Stagger and Fateseal effects. Against Mutants, her Ability Accuracy cannot be modified.
onslaught: Incoming Bleed, Incinerate, and Shock potency is reduced by 150%.
peni-parker: Immune to Poison and Incinerate Effects due to Oscorp\u2019s cutting-edge SP//dr Suit technology.
When Blocking or Auto-Blocking a Hit, Peni cannot be Stunned and Locks the Opponent\u2019s Power.
photon: Photon's altered body composition grants her Immunity to all Bleed and Power Steal effects.
red-skull: Red Skull is Immune to Nullify, Fate Seal, and Stagger effects from Champions.
ronan: Advanced Kree physiology provides full immunity to the Poisons of the Battlerealm.
sabretooth: Sabretooth can withstand incredibly cold temperatures, providing him Immunity to Cold Damage like [k=glossary/coldsnap]Coldsnap[/k] and Frostbite.
sandman: Sandman is Immune to Bleed, Poison, and Shock effects.
sasquatch: During [ffb03e]Wrath of Tanaraq[-] Sasquatch is Stun Immune.
sauron: Immune to all Power Steal, Poison, and Sauron's Regeneration Rate cannot be decreased or increased by outside sources.
sentinel: Advanced robotics provides full immunity to Poison and Bleed effects.
she-hulk: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
silver-surfer: Silver Surfer takes -100% damage from [k=glossary/coldsnap]Coldsnap[/k], Incinerate, and Shock Debuffs. Each stack of these Debuffs count as a Unique Buff for any of Silver Surfer's abilities.
storm: Storm\u2019s control of the elements grants her Immunity to Shock effects.
sunspot: When Sunspot performs a Perfect Block he Purifies 1 Incinerate Debuff on his Opponent.
While Charging a Heavy Attack, Sunspot Purifies 1 Incinerate Debuff on his Opponent every 0.18 seconds.
terrax: Terrax is immune to Shock and Bleed effects due to his rocky body.
the-destroyer: The Destroyer is a magical non-magnetic construct Immune to Slow, Armor Break, Poison, and Bleed. Additionally, the Salve and Willpower Masteries are disabled.
the-serpent: The Serpent gains Immunity to Stun effects during the Opponent\u2019s Special Attacks.
thing: Immune to Bleed, Shock, Armor Break, Armor Shattered, Nullify, [k=glossary/stagger]Stagger[/k], and Fate Seal effects.
toad: Toad is immune to Poison and his regeneration rate cannot be decreased or increased by outside sources.
ultron: Advanced robotics provides full immunity to Poison and Bleed effects.
vision: Advanced robotics provides full immunity to Poison and Bleed effects.
viv-vision: Advanced robotics provide full Immunity to Poison and Bleed, and all Abilites gain 25% Ability Accuracy. Additionally, while she has an Armor Up effect, Viv is Immune to Nullify and Fateseal.
void: A suffocating, choking, and all-consuming Void provides full immunity to Incinerate effects.
vox: Vox\u2019s super-Inhuman physiology grants them Immunity to [k=glossary/poison]Poison[/k], [k=glossary/power_burn]Power Burn[/k], [k=glossary/power_drain]Power Drain[/k], [k=glossary/power_lock]Power Lock[/k] and [k=glossary/special_lock]Special Lock[/k].
warlock: Immune to Bleed, Poison, [k=glossary/coldsnap]Coldsnap[/k], and Frostbite.
white-tiger: The might of the Tiger God grants White Tiger Immunity to Nullify.
